$comment: Layer A for TABSUM vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O1/O2). The four table cells are generated from W-VAL's PICTURE (9(4)V99); each case is four amounts read into the table and summed. The small-value bias exercises the sub-dollar region and the fee rounding.
